notes: Originally crashed on open with a "Can't create direct 3D device" error on Proton 3.7-8 and 3.16-4. Following the instructions on the Proton GitHub page (https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/wiki/Requirements) under "AMD/Intel" allowed the game to launch. Controls, graphics, sound, etc. seem to be working as intended now that the game will launch.
title: Sayonara Umihara Kawase

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Worked perfectly with Xbox 360 controller and no tweaks needed.
